data.title: Gold Reserve denied motion to strike Special Master's notice and granted termination of Energy SPA. #GoldReserve #CITGO.
data.description: In Pembroke, Bermuda, Gold Reserve Ltd. disclosed that on September 18, 2025, Judge Leonard Stark from the U.S. District Court for the District of Delaware rendered a ruling rejecting Gold Reserve’s Motion to Strike the Special Master’s Notice of Superior Proposal. The decision also approved the Special Master’s plea to end Gold Reserve’s Dalinar Energy SPA and sign Elliott’s Amber Energy SPA. Gold Reserve Ltd. is listed as (TSX.V: GRZ), (BSX: GRZ.BH), and (OTCQX: GDRZF). The judgment is a significant development in the ongoing proceedings.

data.title: Perseus Mining receives approval for underground mining at Yaouré in Western Australia on Sept. 19, 2025.
data.description: Approval has been granted for underground development and mining operations at the Yaouré site in Perth, Western Australia as of September 19, 2025. Perseus Mining has successfully secured these approvals, marking a significant step in their operations. This development is set to bring numerous opportunities for growth and expansion in the region. The approval is a critical milestone for Perseus Mining, signifying progress towards their mining targets. This decision is expected to create numerous job opportunities and boost the local economy. The company is set to invest a substantial amount in the project, with estimates suggesting a total investment of $100 million in the development and operations at the Yaouré site. This move aligns with the company's strategic plans for expansion and development in the mining sector.

data.title: Halsey Fest 2025 showcases Newark's vibrant culture and community pride.Celebrating 15 years of hustle and heart in Newark.
data.description: Halsey Fest, an annual celebration in Newark, New Jersey, has been a staple for nearly 15 years. On September 18, 2025, the festival once again showcased the vibrancy of the city, drawing in a diverse crowd. As the sun set, the event came alive with an array of activities, attracting a large number of attendees who proudly displayed their love for Newark. This gathering served as a testament to the enduring spirit of the community, highlighting the unique hustle and heart that define the essence of Newark.

data.title: S&P 500 housing giant sees earnings drop, but Fed rate cut brings optimism.
data.description: The performance of housing stocks hinges largely on the decisions of the Federal Reserve regarding interest rates. Despite a significant decrease in earnings for the S&P 500 housing giants, the recent cut in interest rates by the Fed has provided a sense of hope and positivity for investors.

data.title: GoPro wins 3rd Emmy® Award for 360 tech at 76th Annual Technology and Engineering Emmy® Awards.
data.description: Today, GoPro revealed that they have been honored with their third Emmy® Award for their outstanding innovation in 360 hardware and software. This prestigious recognition was received at the 76th Annual Technology and Engineering Emmy® Awards in San Mateo, California on September 18, 2025. The company's achievement highlights its dedication to pushing boundaries and setting new standards in the industry. This acknowledgment further solidifies GoPro's position as a leader, particularly in the realm of capturing immersive and high-quality content.
